Descubrimiento principal: GSE78220 RNA-seq tumor anti-PD-1

TFM Melanoma Inmunoterapia

2026-05-12

  • 1 Objetivo
    • 1.1 Ficha del informe
  • 2 Librerias
  • 3 Rutas y carga de datos
  • 4 Validaciones iniciales
  • 5 Preparacion de expresion y respuesta
  • 6 Analisis exploratorio y control de calidad
  • 7 DEA con limma
  • 8 Enriquecimiento funcional exploratorio
  • 9 Modelo predictivo exploratorio
  • 10 Guardado de resultados
  • 11 Checklist final
  • 12 Conclusion metodologica
  • 13 Informacion de sesion

1 Objetivo

Este informe implementa el nuevo analisis principal propuesto por la tutora: usar GSE78220 como cohorte de descubrimiento, al ser tumor, RNA-seq, anti-PD-1 y transcriptoma completo.

La finalidad es evitar que el analisis principal quede limitado por los genes incluidos en paneles NanoString y mantener una pregunta biologica mas homogenea: respondedores vs no respondedores a anti-PD-1 en tumor.

1.1 Ficha del informe

Elemento Detalle
Entrada SummarizedExperiment_objects/se_gse78220.rds
Cohorte Tumor, RNA-seq, anti-PD-1
Analisis principal DEA respondedores vs no respondedores con limma
Modelo exploratorio Firma transcriptomica con LOOCV y seleccion interna de genes
Salida resultados/discovery_GSE78220/
Uso posterior Validar genes/firma en GSE215868 y GSE211645

2 Librerias

required_packages <- c(
  "SummarizedExperiment",
  "limma",
  "dplyr",
  "tibble",
  "ggplot2",
  "knitr",
  "matrixStats",
  "tidyr",
  "here",
  "AnnotationDbi",
  "org.Hs.eg.db",
  "clusterProfiler"
)

for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste("Falta instalar el paquete:", pkg))
  }
}

library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(limma)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(matrixStats)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

3 Rutas y carga de datos

project_root <- here::here()
se_path <- file.path(project_root, "SummarizedExperiment_objects", "se_gse78220.rds")
output_dir <- file.path(project_root, "resultados", "discovery_GSE78220")

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

file.exists(se_path)
## [1] TRUE
se <- readRDS(se_path)
stopifnot(inherits(se, "SummarizedExperiment"))

se
## class: SummarizedExperiment

## assays(1): expr
## rownames(25268): A1BG A1BG-AS1 ... ZZEF1 ZZZ3
## rowData names(1): gene_symbol
## colnames(25): Pt1 Pt2 ... Pt37 Pt38
## colData names(7): sample_id patient_id ... tissue platform

4 Validaciones iniciales

dim(se)
## [1] 25268    25
assayNames(se)
## [1] "expr"
colnames(colData(se))
## [1] "sample_id"       "patient_id"      "response_raw"    "response_binary"
## [5] "dataset"         "tissue"          "platform"
head(rowData(se))
## DataFrame with 6 rows and 1 column
##          gene_symbol
##          <character>

## A1BG-AS1    A1BG-AS1

## A2M              A2M
## A2M-AS1      A2M-AS1
## A2ML1          A2ML1
required_vars <- c("response_binary", "dataset", "tissue", "platform")
missing_vars <- setdiff(required_vars, colnames(colData(se)))

if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Faltan variables necesarias: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

cd <- as.data.frame(colData(se)) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id_model")

kable(
  tibble(
    variable = c("dataset", "tissue", "platform"),
    valores = c(
      paste(unique(cd$dataset), collapse = ", "),
      paste(unique(cd$tissue), collapse = ", "),
      paste(unique(cd$platform), collapse = ", ")
    )
  ),
  caption = "Variables tecnicas principales"
)

tissue Tumor

  count(response_raw, response_binary, name = "n") %>%
  kable(caption = "Respuesta cruda y respuesta binaria")
Respuesta cruda y respuesta binaria
response_raw response_binary n
Complete Response Responder 3
Partial Response Responder 10
Progressive Disease No_responder 12

5 Preparacion de expresion y respuesta

prepare_expression <- function(se_obj, min_fpkm = 1, min_samples = NULL) {
  expr <- assay(se_obj, "expr")
  expr <- as.matrix(expr)
  mode(expr) <- "numeric"
  n_rows_original <- nrow(expr)

  gene_symbols <- as.character(rowData(se_obj)$gene_symbol)
  gene_symbols[is.na(gene_symbols) | trimws(gene_symbols) == ""] <- rownames(expr)[is.na(gene_symbols) | trimws(gene_symbols) == ""]
  gene_symbols <- toupper(trimws(gene_symbols))
  n_duplicate_symbols <- sum(duplicated(gene_symbols[!is.na(gene_symbols) & gene_symbols != ""]))

  expr_df <- as.data.frame(expr, check.names = FALSE)
  expr_df$gene_symbol <- gene_symbols

  expr_collapsed <- expr_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene_symbol), gene_symbol != "") %>%
    group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")

  genes <- expr_collapsed$gene_symbol
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(expr_collapsed[, setdiff(colnames(expr_collapsed), "gene_symbol"), drop = FALSE])
  rownames(expr_mat) <- genes
  expr_linear <- expr_mat

  # La metadata del objeto indica FPKM; se trata como escala lineal de RNA-seq
  # y se transforma a log2(FPKM+1) antes del modelo limma.

  # Los datos de GSE78220 estÃ¡n en escala FPKM lineal: se aplica log2(x+1)
  # para estabilizar la varianza y cumplir los supuestos de limma.
  expr_mat <- log2(expr_mat + 1)

  if (is.null(min_samples)) {
    min_samples <- max(3, ceiling(0.20 * ncol(expr_mat)))
  }

  na_genes <- rowSums(is.na(expr_mat)) > 0
  zero_var_genes <- matrixStats::rowVars(expr_mat, na.rm = TRUE) == 0
  low_expr_genes <- rowSums(expr_linear >= min_fpkm, na.rm = TRUE) < min_samples
  keep_genes <- !na_genes & !zero_var_genes & !low_expr_genes

  qc_summary <- tibble(
    paso = c(
      "Genes/filas originales",
      "Simbolos duplicados colapsados",
      "Genes tras colapsar simbolos",
      "Genes retirados por NA",
      "Genes retirados por varianza cero",
      paste0("Genes retirados por baja expresion (FPKM < ", min_fpkm,
             " en al menos ", min_samples, " muestras)"),
      "Genes retenidos para DEA"
    ),
    valor = c(
      n_rows_original,
      n_duplicate_symbols,
      nrow(expr_mat),
      sum(na_genes),
      sum(zero_var_genes),
      sum(low_expr_genes),
      sum(keep_genes)
    )
  )

  list(
    expr = expr_mat[keep_genes, , drop = FALSE],
    expr_log_unfiltered = expr_mat[!na_genes & !zero_var_genes, , drop = FALSE],
    expr_linear_collapsed = expr_linear,
    qc = qc_summary,
    min_fpkm = min_fpkm,
    min_samples = min_samples
  )
}

prepared <- prepare_expression(se)
expr <- prepared$expr
expr_unfiltered <- prepared$expr_log_unfiltered

response_group <- factor(cd$response_binary)
response_group <- relevel(response_group, ref = "No_responder")

stopifnot(ncol(expr) == nrow(cd))
stopifnot(nlevels(response_group) == 2)

kable(prepared$qc, caption = "Control de calidad y filtrado de expresion")

6 Analisis exploratorio y control de calidad

expr_long <- as.data.frame(expr, check.names = FALSE) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "log2_expression") %>%
  left_join(
    cd %>% select(sample_id_model, response_binary),
    by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id_model")
  )

ggplot(expr_long, aes(x = sample_id, y = log2_expression, fill = response_binary)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribucion de expresion por muestra tras log2(FPKM+1) y filtrado",
    x = "Muestra",
    y = "log2(FPKM+1)",
    fill = "Respuesta"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

pca_res <- prcomp(t(expr), center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
pca_var <- round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100, 1)

pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  left_join(
    cd %>% select(sample_id_model, response_binary),
    by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id_model")
  )

write.csv(pca_df, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_QC_PCA_scores.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = response_binary)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA de GSE78220 tras preprocesado",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", pca_var[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", pca_var[2], "%)"),
    color = "Respuesta"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

7 DEA con limma

run_limma_dea <- function(expr_matrix, response) {
  response <- factor(response)
  response <- relevel(response, ref = "No_responder")

  design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + response)
  colnames(design) <- make.names(colnames(design))

  contrast <- makeContrasts(
    responseResponder - responseNo_responder,
    levels = design
  )

  fit <- lmFit(expr_matrix, design)
  fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = 1, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH", sort.by = "none") %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    arrange(adj.P.Val, P.Value)

  list(results = res, design = design, fit = fit2)
}

dea <- run_limma_dea(expr, response_group)
res_dea <- dea$results

res_dea %>%
  head(25) %>%
  kable(digits = 4, caption = "Top 25 genes en GSE78220")

logfc_cutoff <- 0.5
adjp_cutoff <- 0.05
p_cutoff <- 0.05

dea_summary <- res_dea %>%
  mutate(
    significant_fdr = adj.P.Val < adjp_cutoff & abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff,
    nominal = P.Value < p_cutoff & abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff,
    direction = case_when(
      logFC > 0 ~ "Mayor en respondedores",
      logFC < 0 ~ "Mayor en no respondedores",
      TRUE ~ "Sin cambio"
    )
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_fdr = sum(significant_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_nominal = sum(nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_adjP = min(adj.P.Val, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_P = min(P.Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

kable(dea_summary, digits = 4, caption = "Resumen del DEA en GSE78220")
Resumen del DEA en GSE78220
n_genes n_fdr n_nominal min_adjP min_P
14549 0 539 0.7635 1e-04 
res_dea %>%
  mutate(
    neg_log10_P = -log10(P.Value),
    grupo = case_when(
      adj.P.Val < adjp_cutoff & logFC >= logfc_cutoff ~ "Up in responders (FDR)",
      adj.P.Val < adjp_cutoff & logFC <= -logfc_cutoff ~ "Down in responders (FDR)",
      P.Value < p_cutoff & abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff ~ "Nominal",
      TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10_P, color = grupo)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-logfc_cutoff, logfc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "DEA GSE78220: Respondedores vs No respondedores",
    x = "logFC (Responder - No_responder)",
    y = "-log10(P.Value)",
    color = "Resultado"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

res_dea %>%
  mutate(
    grupo = case_when(
      adj.P.Val < adjp_cutoff & abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff ~ "FDR",
      P.Value < p_cutoff & abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff ~ "Nominal",
      TRUE ~ "No significativo"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = AveExpr, y = logFC, color = grupo)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, size = 1.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-logfc_cutoff, logfc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "MA plot GSE78220",
    x = "Expresion media (AveExpr)",
    y = "logFC (Responder - No_responder)",
    color = "Resultado"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

top_heatmap_genes <- res_dea %>%
  filter(P.Value < p_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logfc_cutoff) %>%
  arrange(P.Value) %>%
  slice_head(n = 40) %>%
  pull(gene)

heat_df <- NULL

if (length(top_heatmap_genes) >= 2) {
  expr_heat <- expr[top_heatmap_genes, , drop = FALSE]
  expr_heat_z <- t(scale(t(expr_heat)))
  expr_heat_z[!is.finite(expr_heat_z)] <- 0

  sample_order <- cd %>%
    mutate(response_binary = factor(response_binary, levels = c("No_responder", "Responder"))) %>%
    arrange(response_binary, sample_id_model) %>%
    pull(sample_id_model)
  sample_order <- intersect(sample_order, colnames(expr_heat_z))

  gene_order <- res_dea %>%
    filter(gene %in% top_heatmap_genes) %>%
    arrange(desc(logFC)) %>%
    pull(gene)
  heat_df <- data.frame(.ready = TRUE)
} else {
  heat_df <- NULL
}

if (!is.null(heat_df)) {
  heat_df <- as.data.frame(expr_heat_z[gene_order, sample_order, drop = FALSE], check.names = FALSE) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "z_score") %>%
    mutate(
      gene = factor(gene, levels = rev(gene_order)),
      sample_id = factor(sample_id, levels = sample_order)
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      cd %>% select(sample_id_model, response_binary),
      by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id_model")
    )

  ggplot(heat_df, aes(x = sample_id, y = gene, fill = z_score)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166ac", mid = "white", high = "#b2182b", midpoint = 0) +
    labs(
      title = "Heatmap de los top genes nominales de GSE78220",
      subtitle = "Expresion escalada por gen; muestras ordenadas por respuesta",
      x = "Muestras",
      y = NULL,
      fill = "z-score"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
} else {
  cat("No hay suficientes genes nominales para construir el heatmap.\n")
}

8 Enriquecimiento funcional exploratorio

Como el tamanio muestral de GSE78220 es reducido, no se esperan genes significativos tras FDR. Por ello, el enriquecimiento se interpreta como analisis exploratorio sobre genes nominales, usando todos los genes testados como universo.

map_symbols_to_entrez <- function(symbols) {
  symbols <- unique(toupper(trimws(symbols)))
  symbols <- symbols[!is.na(symbols) & symbols != ""]

  suppressMessages(
    AnnotationDbi::select(
      org.Hs.eg.db::org.Hs.eg.db,
      keys = symbols,
      columns = c("SYMBOL", "ENTREZID"),
      keytype = "SYMBOL"
    )
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(ENTREZID), ENTREZID != "") %>%
    distinct(SYMBOL, ENTREZID)
}

run_go_ora <- function(gene_symbols, universe_symbols, direction_label) {
  gene_map <- map_symbols_to_entrez(gene_symbols)
  universe_map <- map_symbols_to_entrez(universe_symbols)

  gene_entrez <- unique(gene_map$ENTREZID)
  universe_entrez <- unique(universe_map$ENTREZID)

  if (length(gene_entrez) < 5 || length(universe_entrez) < 20) {
    return(tibble())
  }

  ora <- clusterProfiler::enrichGO(
    gene = gene_entrez,
    universe = universe_entrez,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db::org.Hs.eg.db,
    keyType = "ENTREZID",
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.10,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.25,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  out <- as.data.frame(ora)
  if (nrow(out) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }

  out %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(direction = direction_label)
}

genes_up_nominal <- res_dea %>%
  filter(P.Value < p_cutoff, logFC >= logfc_cutoff) %>%
  pull(gene)

genes_down_nominal <- res_dea %>%
  filter(P.Value < p_cutoff, logFC <= -logfc_cutoff) %>%
  pull(gene)

universe_genes <- res_dea$gene

ora_up <- run_go_ora(genes_up_nominal, universe_genes, "Up en respondedores")
ora_down <- run_go_ora(genes_down_nominal, universe_genes, "Down en respondedores")
ora_all <- bind_rows(ora_up, ora_down)

write.csv(ora_up, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_ORA_GO_BP_up_nominal.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(ora_down, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_ORA_GO_BP_down_nominal.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(ora_all, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_ORA_GO_BP_nominal_combined.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ora_summary <- tibble(
  contraste = c("Up en respondedores", "Down en respondedores"),
  n_genes_nominales = c(length(unique(genes_up_nominal)), length(unique(genes_down_nominal))),
  n_terminos_GO = c(nrow(ora_up), nrow(ora_down))
)

kable(ora_summary, caption = "Resumen del enriquecimiento GO BP exploratorio")
Resumen del enriquecimiento GO BP exploratorio
contraste n_genes_nominales n_terminos_GO
Up en respondedores 209 13
Down en respondedores 330 422 
if (nrow(ora_all) > 0) {
  ora_all %>%
    group_by(direction) %>%
    arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 10) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(direction, ID, Description, GeneRatio, Count, pvalue, p.adjust) %>%
    kable(digits = 4, caption = "Top terminos GO BP enriquecidos")
} else {
  cat("No se detectaron terminos GO BP enriquecidos con los umbrales exploratorios definidos.\n")
}

Up en respondedores GO:0042773 ATP synthesis coupled electron transport 7/169 7 2e-04 0.0347
Up en respondedores GO:0042775 mitochondrial ATP synthesis coupled electron transport 7/169 7 2e-04 0.0347 
if (nrow(ora_all) > 0) {
  ora_plot <- ora_all %>%
    group_by(direction) %>%
    arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 8) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      term_label = paste(direction, Description, sep = " | "),
      term_label = factor(term_label, levels = rev(unique(term_label)))
    )

  ggplot(ora_plot, aes(x = -log10(p.adjust), y = term_label, size = Count, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    labs(
      title = "Enriquecimiento GO BP exploratorio en genes nominales",
      x = "-log10(FDR del termino GO)",
      y = NULL,
      size = "N genes",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("No se genera grafico de enriquecimiento porque no hay terminos enriquecidos.\n")
}

9 Modelo predictivo exploratorio

Este bloque no pretende cerrar un modelo clinico definitivo. Con 25 muestras, se usa como evaluacion preliminar de si la seÃ±al transcriptomica permite separar respondedores y no respondedores.

Para reducir fuga de informacion, en cada iteracion leave-one-out se seleccionan genes usando solo el conjunto de entrenamiento.

calc_auc <- function(scores, labels) {
  labels <- factor(labels, levels = c("No_responder", "Responder"))
  y <- as.integer(labels == "Responder")
  n_pos <- sum(y == 1)
  n_neg <- sum(y == 0)
  if (n_pos == 0 || n_neg == 0) return(NA_real_)

  ranks <- rank(scores, ties.method = "average")
  auc <- (sum(ranks[y == 1]) - n_pos * (n_pos + 1) / 2) / (n_pos * n_neg)
  auc
}

score_signature <- function(train_expr, test_expr, train_response, top_n) {
  dea_train <- run_limma_dea(train_expr, train_response)$results
  selected <- dea_train %>%
    arrange(P.Value) %>%
    head(top_n) %>%
    mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC >= 0, 1, -1))

  genes <- selected$gene
  directions <- selected$direction
  names(directions) <- genes

  train_gene_mean <- rowMeans(train_expr[genes, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  train_gene_sd <- matrixStats::rowSds(train_expr[genes, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  train_gene_sd[train_gene_sd == 0 | is.na(train_gene_sd)] <- 1

  test_z <- (test_expr[genes] - train_gene_mean) / train_gene_sd
  mean(test_z * directions, na.rm = TRUE)
}

run_loocv_signature <- function(expr_matrix, response, top_n_values = c(5, 10, 20, 50)) {
  sample_ids <- colnames(expr_matrix)

  bind_rows(lapply(top_n_values, function(top_n) {
    predictions <- lapply(seq_along(sample_ids), function(i) {
      test_sample <- sample_ids[i]
      train_samples <- sample_ids[-i]

      train_expr <- expr_matrix[, train_samples, drop = FALSE]
      test_expr <- expr_matrix[, test_sample]
      train_response <- response[-i]

      score <- score_signature(train_expr, test_expr, train_response, top_n)

      tibble(
        top_n = top_n,
        sample_id = test_sample,
        response = as.character(response[i]),
        score = score
      )
    }) %>% bind_rows()

    auc <- calc_auc(predictions$score, predictions$response)
    threshold <- median(predictions$score, na.rm = TRUE)

    predictions %>%
      mutate(
        auc = auc,
        predicted = ifelse(score >= threshold, "Responder", "No_responder"),
        correct = predicted == response
      )
  }))
}

loocv_predictions <- run_loocv_signature(expr, response_group)

loocv_summary <- loocv_predictions %>%
  group_by(top_n) %>%
  summarise(
    auc = first(auc),
    accuracy = mean(correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(auc))

kable(loocv_summary, digits = 3, caption = "Modelo exploratorio LOOCV por numero de genes")
Modelo exploratorio LOOCV por numero de genes
top_n auc accuracy
5 0.853 0.76
10 0.686 0.60
50 0.571 0.60
20 0.558 0.44 
best_top_n <- loocv_summary$top_n[1]

loocv_predictions %>%
  filter(top_n == best_top_n) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = response, y = score, color = response)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Firma exploratoria GSE78220 - LOOCV top ", best_top_n, " genes"),
    x = "Respuesta",
    y = "Score de firma"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

10 Guardado de resultados

write.csv(res_dea, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_DEA_limma_response.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(loocv_predictions, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_LOOCV_signature_predictions.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(loocv_summary, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_LOOCV_signature_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(prepared$qc, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_expression_QC_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(dea, file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_DEA_limma_response.rds"))

list.files(output_dir, full.names = TRUE)

11 Checklist final

checks <- tibble(
  comprobacion = c(
    "Objeto GSE78220 cargado",
    "Cohorte tumoral",
    "Plataforma RNA-seq",
    "Dos grupos de respuesta",
    "Filtrado de baja expresion documentado",
    "QC PCA guardado",
    "Enriquecimiento GO exploratorio ejecutado",
    "DEA ejecutado sobre transcriptoma completo",
    "Modelo LOOCV generado",
    "Resultados guardados"
  ),
  estado = c(
    inherits(se, "SummarizedExperiment"),
    all(cd$tissue == "Tumor"),
    all(cd$platform == "RNA-seq"),
    nlevels(response_group) == 2,
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_expression_QC_summary.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_QC_PCA_scores.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_ORA_GO_BP_nominal_combined.csv")),
    nrow(res_dea) > 1000,
    nrow(loocv_predictions) > 0,
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "GSE78220_DEA_limma_response.csv"))
  )
)

kable(checks, caption = "Checklist final GSE78220")
Checklist final GSE78220
comprobacion estado
Objeto GSE78220 cargado TRUE
Cohorte tumoral TRUE
Plataforma RNA-seq TRUE
Dos grupos de respuesta TRUE
Filtrado de baja expresion documentado TRUE
QC PCA guardado TRUE
Enriquecimiento GO exploratorio ejecutado TRUE
DEA ejecutado sobre transcriptoma completo TRUE
Modelo LOOCV generado TRUE
Resultados guardados TRUE 
if (!all(checks$estado)) {
  stop("Alguno de los checks finales no se cumple.")
}

12 Conclusion metodologica

Este informe deja preparado el bloque de descubrimiento principal usando GSE78220 sin restriccion por panel NanoString. Los genes candidatos y la firma exploratoria obtenidos aqui deben interpretarse como hipotesis de descubrimiento y validarse posteriormente en GSE215868 y GSE211645.
